description_long: This object is a small, minimalist airplane with a slender fuselage and a pair of straight wings extending from either side. The wings are positioned at a mid-level on the fuselage and appear to be relatively short in span. The airplane features a simple tail assembly with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer, forming a conventional tail design. The landing gear is not clearly visible, suggesting it may be retracted or minimally modeled. The cockpit is located at the forward section of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a small canopy or window area. The overall color scheme is predominantly black with a few small red and white details.
description: A small, minimalist black airplane with mid-mounted straight wings, a conventional tail, and a forward enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, forward cockpit area, and the symmetrical placement of the wings.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the length of the fuselage and the mid-mounted wings extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, including the vertical and horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the wings and tail from the other side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Not visibly modeled or apparent in the images.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visibly modeled or apparent in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a small canopy or window area.
